name: Wallbridge Mining Company Limited
summary: Wallbridge Mining Company Limited engages in the acquisition, discovery, development, and production of metals. The company primarily explores for gold, copper, and nickel deposits, as well as platinum group metals. Its flagship property is the Fenelon gold property located in the province of Quebec, Canada. Wallbridge Mining Company Limited was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Lively, Canada.
